title: Charred Japanese-Style Braze Beef with Cauliflower Rice
description: A keto-friendly dish featuring charred beef, Japanese-inspired flavors, and a low-carb twist on traditional rice.

ingredients.name: Flank steak
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality cut for optimal flavor and texture

ingredients.name: Cauliflower
ingredients.notes: You'll need to rice this in a food processor

instructions: Season the flank steak with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes.
Grill the steak for 3-4 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 130°F for medium-rare.
Let the steak rest for 5-7 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
Meanwhile, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the cauliflower rice to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it's tender and lightly browned.
Stir in the soy sauce and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of the cauliflower rice on a plate, top it with sliced beef, and garnish with chopped green onions and sesame seeds.
